overview: VIT-AP Student Hub is a concise, honest informational website for freshers and prospective VIT-AP students. It covers academics, hostel life, food, essentials, campus facilities, and more — helping visitors decide whether the college is right for them.
features: FFCS explanation for second semester onwards
Move-in packing guide with campus stall tips
Pros and cons summary to help prospective students decide
Mess timings, pricing, and food quality honest review
Hostel room types and AY 2025-26 pricing
